meta.question: Which parent requirments trace down to the APS Interfce Requirements?

events.output: I'll help you find which parent requirements trace down to the APS Interface Requirements. Let me start by exploring the model to find this element.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Interface Requirements"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Interface Requirements"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Interface"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")) && CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Requirements"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Interface%20Requirements" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?owner ?ownerName ?ownerType WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Interface%20Requirements" .
  ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  ?owner rdf:type ?ownerType .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?parent ?parentName ?parentType WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Interface%20Requirements" .
  ?parent vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
  ?parent rdf:type ?parentType .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?parent ?parentName ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Interface%20Requirements" .
  ?parent vocab:Package_packagedElement ?elem .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
  ?parent rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?reqName ?reqType WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  ?req vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?child .
  ?child vocab:NamedElement_name ?childName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?childName), "interface"))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?parent ?parentName ?qn WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name "Interface%20Requirements" .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?qn, "APS"))
  ?parent vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?parent ?parentName ?qn WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Requirements" .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
  ?parent vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?owner ?ownerName ?type WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Interface%20Requirements" .
  ?elem vocab:Element_owner|^vocab:Element_ownedElement ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  ?owner rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25
